content:
I’m Nobody! Who are you? Are you – Nobody – too? Then there’s a pair of us! ~ Emily Dickinson
Tech support person and occasional contributor seen online around various FOSS communities, Ph.D. student in Mathematics
Personal details Hello, my name is Boudhayan Bhattacharya but I usually go by the alias bbhtt online. I live in India. I completed my Bachelors (Honours) in Mathematics in June 2021 with 83.66% marks and I completed my Masters in Mathematics in June 2023 with 80.3% marks. I’m currently doing Ph.D. in Mathematical Biology. I teach part-time.
I’m interested in Free and Open Source Software (FOSS), technology and privacy.
I like watching movies, TV, anime; reading books; playing games and listening to music. I play online chess sometimes, although I never studied it, but I want to someday! I also participate in various online communities related to FOSS.
This is just a place for random things I find interesting.
Links Links Arch Linux Bugs Bugzilla Mozilla fedoraproject.org Codeberg GitHub GitLab.com GitLab FDO GitLab GNOME GitLab KDE Ubuntu Launchpad Contact You can contact me via:
My email or any of the emails associated with my GPG key. My GPG key is D26D 7533 9500 9DB2 B3B2 6094 0C32 51A2 4745 E484 (available through other keyservers also) or available directly here [matrix]: @bbhtt:matrix.org, @bbhtt:tchncs.de IRC: bbhtt on Libera.chat, OFTC Licence and attributions The site is made with Hugo and themed by Monochrome. The website source is availabe here. The website content is under CC-BY-SA-4.0 unless otherwise stated. My avatar and the favicon are licensed under CC-BY-NC-3.0. The Mastodon icon is a trademark of Mastodon gGmbH, the matrix.org icon is a trademark of Matrix.org Foundation. Rest of the icons in the footer are from Feather Icons.
title: About
